list.Name: "<title>" should be present in all pages
Cognitive Complexity of functions should not be too high
String literals should not be duplicated
Track uses of "TODO" tags
Label elements should have a text label and an associated control
Selectors should not be duplicated
CSS files should not be empty
If statements should not be the only statement in else blocks
Top-level await should be preferred over wrapped async operations
Memory requests should be specified
CPU requests should be specified
Storage requests should be specified
Mergeable "if" statements should be combined
Generic exceptions ErrorException, RuntimeException and Exception should not be thrown
Unused function parameters should be removed
Sections of code should not be commented out
Classes named like "Exception" should extend "Exception" or a subclass
Sections of code should not be commented out
Reduce the amount of consecutive RUN instructions
Unnecessary imports should be removed
Use "globalThis" instead of "window", "self", or "global"
Node.js built-in modules should be imported using the "node:" protocol
Strings should use "replaceAll()" instead of "replace()" with global regex
Field names should comply with a naming convention
Memory limits should be enforced
Service account permissions should be restricted
Recursively copying context directories is security-sensitive
Running containers as a privileged user is security-sensitive
Creating cookies without the "HttpOnly" flag is security-sensitive
Allowing non-root users to modify resources copied to an image is security-sensitive
Using weak hashing algorithms is security-sensitive
Using remote artifacts without integrity checks is security-sensitive
Creating cookies without the "secure" flag is security-sensitive
